data_description.name: A friendly name for this device.
data_description.device_type: Select whether this is a basic on/off device or a variable-power device.

data_description.refresh_period_sec: How often (in seconds) the algorithm re-evaluates device states.
data_description.grid_consumption_entity_id: Sensor reporting current grid import/export power (negative = export).
data_description.power_production_entity_id: Sensor reporting total PV production power. Leave empty if not available.
data_description.subscribe_to_events: When enabled, the algorithm also reacts immediately to sensor state-change events instead of only polling.
data_description.battery_soc_entity_id: Sensor reporting the battery state of charge in percent. Leave empty if no battery is present.
data_description.battery_consumption_entity_id: Sensor reporting current battery charge/discharge power. Leave empty if no battery is present.
data_description.reset_time: Time of day at which daily runtimes are reset.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this device.
data_description.entity_id: The switch, boolean, or similar entity that physically turns this device on or off.
data_description.nominal_power: Expected power consumption when the device is turned on (watts).
data_description.power_sensor_entity_id: Sensor reporting the actual power consumption of this device. Used instead of nominal power once the device is on.
data_description.check_usable_template: A template that evaluates to true when this device is eligible to be switched on.
data_description.delay_activate_min: Minimum time (minutes) of sufficient excess power before the device is turned on.
data_description.ontime_duration_min: Minimum time (minutes) the device must stay on after being activated.
data_description.delay_deactivate_min: Minimum time (minutes) of insufficient excess power before the device is turned off.
data_description.offtime_duration_min: Minimum time (minutes) the device must stay off after being deactivated.
data_description.activate_actions: Actions to execute when the device is activated.
data_description.deactivate_actions: Actions to execute when the device is deactivated.
data_description.battery_min_soc: The battery must be at or above this state of charge (%) before this device may be switched on.
data_description.standby_power: If the device is on and its measured power drops below this threshold (watts), it is immediately deactivated.
data_description.min_daily_runtime: Force the device on at the off-peak time if it has not yet accumulated this many minutes of runtime today.
data_description.max_daily_runtime: Switch the device off once it has accumulated this many minutes of runtime today.
data_description.offpeak_time: Time of day at which the device is force-started if its minimum daily runtime has not been reached.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this device.
data_description.entity_id: The entity used to toggle the device on or off (optional for variable-only devices).
data_description.nominal_power: Initial power level used when the device is first activated (watts).
data_description.power_sensor_entity_id: Sensor reporting the actual power consumption of this device.
data_description.power_entity_id: The number or input_number entity used to set the current power level of this device.
data_description.power_max: Maximum allowed power for this device (watts).
data_description.power_step: Increment by which the power is raised or lowered each cycle (watts).
data_description.duration_power_min: Minimum time (minutes) the device must hold a power level before it is changed again.
data_description.check_usable_template: A template that evaluates to true when this device is eligible to be switched on.
data_description.delay_activate_min: Minimum time (minutes) of sufficient excess power before the device is turned on.
data_description.ontime_duration_min: Minimum time (minutes) the device must stay on after being activated.
data_description.delay_deactivate_min: Minimum time (minutes) of insufficient excess power before the device is turned off.
data_description.offtime_duration_min: Minimum time (minutes) the device must stay off after being deactivated.
data_description.activate_actions: Actions to execute when the device is activated.
data_description.deactivate_actions: Actions to execute when the device is deactivated.
data_description.power_divide_factor: Divide the excess power by this factor before applying it to the power control entity (e.g. for three-phase devices set to 3).
data_description.battery_min_soc: The battery must be at or above this state of charge (%) before this device may be switched on.
data_description.standby_power: If the device is on and its measured power drops below this threshold (watts), it is immediately deactivated.
data_description.min_daily_runtime: Force the device on at the off-peak time if it has not yet accumulated this many minutes of runtime today.
data_description.max_daily_runtime: Switch the device off once it has accumulated this many minutes of runtime today.
data_description.offpeak_time: Time of day at which the device is force-started if its minimum daily runtime has not been reached.

data_description.refresh_period_sec: How often (in seconds) the algorithm re-evaluates device states.
data_description.grid_consumption_entity_id: Sensor reporting current grid import/export power (negative = export).
data_description.power_production_entity_id: Sensor reporting total PV production power. Leave empty if not available.
data_description.subscribe_to_events: When enabled, the algorithm also reacts immediately to sensor state-change events instead of only polling.
data_description.battery_soc_entity_id: Sensor reporting the battery state of charge in percent. Leave empty if no battery is present.
data_description.battery_consumption_entity_id: Sensor reporting current battery charge/discharge power. Leave empty if no battery is present.
data_description.reset_time: Time of day at which daily runtimes are reset.

reset_device_runtime.name: Reset device runtime
reset_device_runtime.description: Reset the daily runtime counter for a managed device to zero.
